data.Name: Blacksky Technology Inc
data.Description: BlackSky Technology Inc. (BKSY) is a leader in geospatial intelligence, employing a cutting-edge fleet of small satellites to provide real-time Earth observation and actionable insights. The company harnesses advanced artificial intelligence and machine learning technologies to convert satellite imagery into strategic analytics, catering to diverse sectors such as defense, agriculture, and urban planning. With a commitment to enhancing decision-making capabilities for both commercial and government clients, BlackSky is well-positioned for significant growth within the expanding space economy and geospatial market, driving innovation and accessibility in its offerings.
data.Address: 2411 DULLES CORNER PARK, HERNDON, VA, UNITED STATES, 20171
